data.title: BE Semiconductor reports Q4 results
data.description:
• BE Semiconductor press release (OTC:BESIY): Q4 GAAP EPS of €0.74.
  • Revenue of €153.4M (-3.9% Y/Y)
  • Orders of € 121.9 million down 19.7% vs. Q3-24 and 26.7% vs. Q4-23 due primarily to decreased bookings for high performance computing and mainstream assembly applications
  • Gross margin of 64.0% decreased by 0.7 points vs. Q3-24 and 1.1 points vs. Q4-23 primarily due to adverse net forex influences
  • Net income of € 59.3 million increased 26.7% vs. Q3-24 and 8.0% vs. Q4-23 due to € 18.2 million of net tax benefits realized. As a result, net margin rose to 38.6% vs. 29.9% in Q3-24 and 34.4% in Q4-23
  • Cash and deposits of € 672.3 million at year-end increased 62.6% versus year-end 2023. Net cash of € 143.8 million increased € 33.1 million (29.9%) vs. Q3-24 and € 30.8 million (27.3%) vs. Q4-23

  • Q1-25 Outlook

    • Revenue expected to decrease 0-10% vs. the € 153.4 million reported in Q4-24
    • Gross margin expected to range between 63-65% vs. the 64.0% realized in Q4-24
    • Operating expenses expected to grow 10-20% vs. the € 47.6 million reported in Q4-24

data.title: Pantheon Resources hires ex-BP executive Max Easley as CEO
data.description:
Pantheon Resources (OTCQX:PTHRF) Thursday named Max Easley as Chief Executive Officer, succeeding Jay Cheatham.

Easley will be appointed as a member of the Pantheon (OTCQX:PTHRF) Board of Directors effective 28 February 2025, while Jay will continue to serve the company as a non-executive director for a period of handover to Max.

The appointment of Easley is another key step in the development of the Board and governance in preparation for a possible U.S. listing, the oil and gas company said.

Over the course of his career, Max has held executive roles at BP (BP), Apache (APA) and PETRONAS Canada.

data.title: NetEase reports Q4 results
data.description:
• NetEase press release (NASDAQ:NTES): Q4 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.42.
  • Revenue of $3.7B.
  • Gross profit was RMB16.3 billion (US$2.2 billion), a decrease of 3.3% compared with the same quarter of 2023.
  • Total operating expenses were RMB8.5 billion (US$1.2 billion), a decrease of 15.1% compared with the same quarter of 2023.
  • Net income attributable to the Company's shareholders was RMB8.8 billion (US$1.2 billion). Non-GAAP net income attributable to the Company's shareholders was RMB9.7 billion (US$1.3 billion).[1]
  • Basic net income per share was US$0.38

data.title: Tuya Smart integrates DeepSeek AI with focus on pet tech sector
data.description:
• Tuya Smart (NYSE:TUYA) Thursday announced the integration of its AIoT platform with AI models including DeepSeek (DEEPSEEK), as it focuses on the next generation of AI-powered pet technology.
  • The announcement comes during a current wave of AI technology competition worldwide, which showcases numerous commercial possibilities in fields such as energy management, pet care, emotional companionship, and smart homes.
  • Tuya's (NYSE:TUYA) integration with DeepSeek (DEEPSEEK) is expected to have a significant impact on the pet care industry through the synergy between Tuya's AIoT platform and DeepSeek's multimodal AI capabilities.

data.title: Lloyds Banking reports FY results
data.description:
• Lloyds Banking press release (NYSE:LYG): FY GAAP EPS of 6.30 p.
  • Revenue of £12.28B (-7.7% Y/Y).
  • 2025 guidance: Underlying net interest income of c.£13.5 billion; Operating costs of c.£9.7 billion; Asset quality ratio of c.25 basis points; Return on tangible equity of c.13.5 per cent • Capital generation of c.175 basis points
  • 2026 guidance: Cost:income ratio of less than 50 per cent; Return on tangible equity of greater than 15 per cent; Capital generation of greater than 200 basis points; To pay down to a CET1 ratio of c.13.0 per cent

data.title: SAP SE raises annual dividend by ~7% to €2.35
data.description:
• SAP SE (NYSE:SAP) declares €2.35/share annual dividend, 6.8% increase from prior dividend of €2.20.
  • Payable May 16; for shareholders of record May 14; ex-div May 13.
  • See SAP Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Airbus reports FY results
data.description:
• Airbus SE press release (OTCPK:EADSF): FY GAAP EPS of €5.36.
  • Revenue of €69.2B (+6% Y/Y)
  • EBIT (reported) € 5.3 billion
  • Outlook: On that basis, the Company targets to achieve in 2025:
  • Around 820 commercial aircraft deliveries;
  • EBIT Adjusted of around € 7.0 billion;
  • Free Cash Flow before Customer Financing of around € 4.5 billion.
  • Dividend proposals: dividend of € 2.00 per share; special dividend of € 1.00 per share

data.title: D.R. Horton announces pricing of $700 million of 5.500% senior notes due 2035
data.description:
• D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) on Wednesday said that it has priced a registered underwritten public offering of $700 million aggregate principal amount of 5.500% senior notes due 2035.
  • The senior notes will pay interest semi-annually at a rate of 5.500% per year and will mature on October 15, 2035.
  • The closing of the offering is expected to occur on February 26, 2025.
  • D.R. Horton (NYSE:DHI) intends to use the net proceeds of the offering for general corporate purposes.
